content: {"file": "backend/api/routers/export.py", "summary": "This file contains an endpoint for downloading a generated document based on a job ID. It uses FastAPI to create the route and handles HTTP exceptions if the job or document is not found.", "rules": [{"name": "get_export_document", "description": "Retrieve the export document associated with a given job ID.", "conditions": ["Job state must exist for the provided job_id.", "Document path must be valid and exist on disk."], "actions": ["Return an HTTP 404 error if the job or document is not found.", "Serve the document as a FileResponse with appropriate media type."]},{"name": "get_job_state", "description": "Fetches the state of a given job ID from the pipeline runner module.", "conditions": [], "actions": ["Returns None if no state exists for the provided job_id."]}], "dependencies": ["fastapi", "os", "pipeline.runner"]}
